summary: Admin Dashboard UI pages testing completed successfully. All 6 admin pages (Candidates, Employers, Jobs, Projects, Users, Documents) are fully functional with navigation, filtering, detail modals, and action buttons working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@gjc.ro / admin123 works correctly
Admin Dashboard loads at /admin with stats overview
Admin Candidates page loads at /admin/candidates with candidate list
Admin Candidates - status filter dropdown works (all, pending_validation, validated, rejected, draft)
Admin Candidates - search functionality filters by name, nationality, profession
Admin Candidates - view detail modal opens and shows complete candidate info
Admin Candidates - detail modal shows uploaded documents (13 documents)
Admin Candidates - validate/reject buttons visible for pending candidates
Admin Employers page loads at /admin/employers with employer list
Admin Employers - status filter dropdown works
Admin Employers - view detail modal shows company info and IGI eligibility
Admin Employers - IGI eligibility section shows 4 checkmarks (debts, sanctions, employees, age)
Admin Employers - validate/reject buttons in detail modal for pending employers
Admin Employers - validation confirmation modal with notes textarea
Admin Jobs page loads at /admin/jobs with job list and stats
Admin Jobs - status cards show counts (2 Draft, 0 Deschis, 0 În Progres, 0 Completat, 3 Anulat)
Admin Jobs - clicking status card filters jobs by status
Admin Jobs - matching candidates button opens modal with candidate matches
Admin Jobs - matching modal shows candidate score (70% for Test Candidate)
Admin Jobs - status change dropdown in table works (Draft, Deschis, În Progres, Completat, Anulat)
Admin Projects page loads at /admin/projects with pipeline view
Admin Projects - pipeline overview shows 8 stage cards with counts
Admin Projects - stage filter dropdown shows all 16 stages
Admin Projects - empty state displays correctly when no projects
Admin Users page loads at /admin/users with all users
Admin Users - role stats cards show counts (1 Candidat, 5 Angajator, 0 Student, 0 Imigrare, 1 Admin)
Admin Users - clicking role card filters users by role
Admin Users - role filter dropdown works
Admin Documents page loads at /admin/documents with document list
Admin Documents - owner type stats show counts (13 Candidat, 0 Angajator, 0 Proiect)
Admin Documents - type filter dropdown shows all document types with counts
Admin Documents - view/download buttons work for each document
critical_code_review_comments: All admin pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
AdminLayout.jsx properly checks for admin role and redirects non-admins
All pages use consistent UI patterns (Card, Table, Badge, Dialog components)
API calls use credentials: 'include' for session-based auth
Status/role filtering uses URL search params for shareable links
Empty states are handled gracefully with appropriate messages
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 admin pages fully tested and working: /admin (Dashboard), /admin/candidates, /admin/employers, /admin/jobs, /admin/projects, /admin/documents, /admin/users. Admin login required (admin@gjc.ro / admin123). All pages have filtering, search, detail modals, and action buttons. Jobs page has status change dropdown and matching candidates feature. Employers page has IGI eligibility section and validate/reject functionality.

features: Status filter (all, pending_validation, validated, rejected, draft)
Detail modal with full profile info
Status cards with counts (Draft, Deschis, În Progres, Completat, Anulat)
Search by title, COR code, location
Status change dropdown in table row
Detail modal (not tested - no projects exist)
Stage update modal (not tested - no projects exist)
Add note functionality (not tested - no projects exist)
Role stats cards (Candidat, Angajator, Student, Imigrare, Admin)
